docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO SHERI STELBURG RETURNED AND SIGNED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-17-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'REILLY,AILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STELLBURG,SHERI $2,076.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,076.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
FOLDER BROUGHT BY REF LEON TO SMALL CLAIMS FOR JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'REILLY,AILEEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STELLBURG,SHERI $1,038.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,038.00, ERROR IN COMPUTATION MADE ON FIRST JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,115.00 FILED BY O'REILLY,AILEEN AS TO DEFENDANT STELLBURG,SHERI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
APPEAL FILED ON 7-21-94 AND REMOVED 'CAUSE OF AMENDMENT OF JUDGMENT MADE BY JUDGE LEON.
